_metadata.name: Security Scan Discord Report
_metadata.description: Scan a container image with Trivy, build a prioritized CVE summary, post results to Discord, and save a JSON report artifact.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Security Scan Discord Report
manifest.description: Trivy image scan with Discord webhook notification and artifact report.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Security Scan Discord Report
graph.description: Authorized container image scan with Discord notification for triage teams.

runtimeInputs.label: Container image reference
runtimeInputs.description: Public or locally available container image reference, for example nginx:1.25 or node:18-alpine.

requiredSecrets.name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
requiredSecrets.description: Discord Incoming Webhook URL for scan notifications
